title: Realtime documentation and CLI UX
description:
## Intent
As a developer or operator, I want clear documentation and CLI semantics for realtime gossip and overlay so that I can configure and operate it correctly.

## Definition of Done
- docs/REALTIME.md created with quickstart, architecture, CLI reference, config examples, overlay semantics, GC, troubleshooting, and AWS IoT Core outline.
- CLI_REFERENCE.md and CONFIGURATION.md updated with new commands and config fields.
- GETTING_STARTED.md updated with a realtime quickstart.
- Policy exception for discovery precedence documented explicitly.
creator: ryan.porter
